title: Sweetheart Thronet Chair - White Vinyl/Gold Frame
features: A truly one of a kind chair option that can make a memory last for a lifetime, your next special event requires special seating for the guest honor and there's no better way to display a sense of royalty than with our Sweetheart Thronet Chair.
Perfect for the head table at any wedding, bachelorette, baptism or quinceañera, this thronet chair has a relatively manageable size compared to other throne dining chairs in its category.
At only 25.6'' wide, 23'' deep and 55'' high, you'll be providing a comfortable seat while also saving room on your event space floor for more decor and easier storage.

Each Sweetheart Thronet Chair features a handcrafted, commercial-grade mahogany wood frame with stunning curves and plush vinyl cushions from the top of the backrest to the extra soft seat cushion so you can hold court while feeling weightless.
For added long term care, all of our Throne Chairs ship with a free Chair Cover so you don't have to worry about dust or damages in storage or transportation.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k
